summary: Comprehensive e2e testing of CarryOn estate planning app batch changes: 6 onboarding steps, sidebar order, step counter font size, Adult/Minor underline, Quick Actions grid, mic buttons, copy button, DAV page

backend_tests.onboarding_progress_6_steps: PASS - GET /api/onboarding/progress returns 6 steps: create_message, upload_document, designate_primary, customize_checklist, add_credential, review_readiness
backend_tests.step_order_correct: PASS - add_credential is step 5 (DAV onboarding step)

frontend_tests.dashboard_step_counter: PASS - Guided overlay shows 'STEP 1 OF 6' in text-xl lg:text-2xl (large bold gold text)
frontend_tests.sidebar_menu_order: PASS - Menu order: Dashboard > MM > SDV > IAC > DAV > EGA > DTS > Beneficiaries > Timeline
frontend_tests.signup_adult_underline: PASS - 'Adult' in 'Adult Dependent 1' has gold underline
frontend_tests.signup_minor_underline: PASS - 'Minor' in 'Minor Dependent 1' has gold underline
frontend_tests.guardian_quick_actions_grid: PASS - Quick Actions uses grid-cols-2 (2-column grid layout)
frontend_tests.guardian_mic_button: PASS - landing-mic-button found and visible in input area
frontend_tests.guardian_no_border_above_input: INFO - Subtle container border exists but no visible divider line above input
frontend_tests.guardian_copy_button: PASS - copy-message-0 button appears below assistant response
frontend_tests.messages_dictate_mic: PASS - message-mic-button found with text 'Dictate Message' below content textarea
frontend_tests.digital_wallet_page_loads: PASS - DAV page loads correctly with 'Add Account' button and credential form modal
frontend_tests.celebration_settings_text: PASS (Code Review) - Line 683: 're-enable it in Settings' text present

context_for_next_testing_agent: All batch changes verified: 6-step onboarding (with add_credential/DAV step), sidebar reorder, step counter font size, Adult/Minor underlines in signup, Quick Actions 2x2 grid, mic buttons in EGA and Messages, copy button after EGA responses, DAV page loads. Rate limit: 10 req/min on auth - test user device is trusted so no OTP needed. Voice-to-text buttons render but Web Speech API won't work in headless browser.
notes: Voice-to-text uses Web Speech API which won't work in headless playwright - but mic buttons render correctly
